title: notifications-sms — field classification

audit_log: audits.notifications-sms.* rows for opt-out create + revoke + cost events.

notes: SmsOptOut.phone is `confidential` (PII — phone number). On GDPR Art. 17 erasure: replaced with SHA-256 hash + row retained for TCPA evidence.

SmsOptOut.inbound_message_body may contain PII (user typed a comment with STOP). Sanitised via InboundMessageSanitiseCast — keeps first 100 chars, redacts anything looking like an email address / URL / other phone number.
SMS message BODY (in NotificationDelivery.payload) is confidential per notifications core.
